creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
Below is an entry for UPDATING to indicate the move of the FreeBSD
Carddeck from games/kdegames3 to the games/freebsd-carddeck-kde{3,4}
ports:

200903xx:
  AFFECTS: users of games/kdegames3
  AUTHOR: swhetzel@gmail.com

  The FreeBSD Carddeck is now available separately as ports for KDE 3 and
  KDE 4.  games/kdegames3 no longer includes the FreeBSD Carddeck.

	games/freebsd-carddeck-kde3
	games/freebsd-carddeck-kde4

  Use this portupgrade command to reinstall kdegames3 and install the FreeBSD
  Carddeck:

	# portupgrade -f games/kdegames3 games/freebsd-carddeck-kde3
